text:
Created attachment 182787
patch from code review

This script can be used to restrict rsync to subdirectory declared in .ssh/authorized_key


e.g https://www.guyrutenberg.com/2014/01/14/restricting-ssh-access-to-rsync/

Code review at: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D10851
